name: Joruri-P.U.N.K. Dangerous Gabu
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｊｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジョウルリ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ．Ｕ．Ｎ．Ｋ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パンク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>デンジャラス・ガブ
desc: Target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects (until the end of this turn), then, if you control a "P.U.N.K." monster, gain LP equal to that targeted monster's original ATK. You can only activate 1 "Joruri-P.U.N.K. Dangerous Gabu" per turn.
eff: Target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects (until the end of this turn), then, if you control a "P.U.N.K." monster, gain LP equal to that targeted monster's original ATK. You can only activate 1 "Joruri-P.U.N.K. Dangerous Gabu" per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
